problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
